zh.lifeSummary: 當Dionysis Abberbury於大約1327年出生在英國史洛普爾阿爾波波利時，她的父親Thomas Abberbury21歲，母親Steeple Aston11325歲。她於1354年與John Barker de Olney在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1420年在英國瓦維其可爾羅雅爾 利阿明頓 斯帕享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dionysis Abberbury于大约1327年出生在英国史洛普爾阿爾波波利时，她的父亲Thomas Abberbury21岁，母亲Steeple Aston11325岁。她于1354年与John Barker de Olney在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1420年在英国瓦維其可爾羅雅爾 利阿明頓 斯帕享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dionysis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Denise ; see Dennis . This form was in use in northern England from the 14th to the 17th century; the short form Dye is the source of the surname Dyson.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Dionysis Abberbury was born about 1327, in Alberbury, Shropshire, England, her father, Thomas Abberbury, was 21 and her mother, Steeple Aston, was 11325. She married John Barker de Olney in 1354, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1420, in Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dionysis Abberbury est née environ 1327, à Alberbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Abberbury, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Steeple Aston, avait 11325 ans. Elle a épousé John Barker de Olney en 1354, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dionysis Abberbury um 1327 in Alberbury, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Abberbury 21 und ihre Mutter Steeple Aston 11325. Sie hat 1354 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom John Barker de Olney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dionysis Abberbury è nata il circa 1327 nel Alberbury, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Abberbury, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Steeple Aston, aveva 11325 anni. Lei sposato John Barker de Olney nel 1354, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1420, nel Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dionysis Abberburyが約1327年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアアルバーブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Abberburyは21歳，母Steeple Astonは11325歳であった。1354年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでJohn Barker de Olneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1420年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアロイアル リーミントン スプアで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dionysis Abberbury(이)가 대략 1327년 영국 슈럽실르 알버버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Abberbury(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Steeple Aston(은)는 11325세였다. 그녀는 1354년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 John Barker de Olney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 워윅실르 로야 리밍턴 스파에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Barker de Olney em 1354, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dionysis Abberbury родилась около 1327 г. в местности альбирбури, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Abberbury было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Steeple Aston, 11325. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Barker de Olney в 1354 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности рояль лимингтон спа, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 94 лет.

Se casó con John Barker de Olney en 1354, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
